description_long: This gatehouse is a rectangular, two-story public building with a prominent, light-colored roof and a symmetrical facade. The structure is surrounded by green lawns and paved roads, indicating its placement in an urban park or institutional setting. The main entryway features a series of large, arched openings, likely serving as the primary access point for both pedestrians and vehicles. Windows are distributed evenly along the sides, with a focus on the upper level, providing natural light and visibility. The exterior appears to be constructed from stone or concrete, with a flat or gently sloped roof. The building is substantial in size, suggesting it serves as a formal checkpoint or entrance to a larger complex.
description: A large, rectangular gatehouse with a light roof, arched entryways, and symmetrical window placement, set within a landscaped urban area.
description_view_0: The gatehouse is seen from an oblique angle, highlighting the main arched entryway and the surrounding green space.
description_view_1: This view shows the side of the gatehouse, emphasizing the length of the building and the adjacent road.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the gatehouse are visible, with more green space and secondary structures in the background.
description_view_3: A direct frontal view of the gatehouse, showcasing the main arched entryway and symmetrical landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Series of large arched stone doorways with prominent columns
attribute_window_placement: Evenly spaced rectangular windows on upper level and flanking the entry
